title: CAP’2ER® : a free evaluation tool to assess the environmental performances of your farm
subtitle: Objective evaluation of the environmental footprint
description: A factsheet presenting CAP’2ER®, an automated environmental performance diagnostic tool adapted for broiler chicken farms. It outlines the free level 1 online self-assessment process, upcoming paid level 2 in-depth evaluation, benchmark references, objectives, data requirements, and cost structure.
